reviews.review_msg: The assignment and materials were fine and straight forward. The two quizzes and final were really hard. So really prep for quizzes and final.

The prof seems nice, but the course structure is poor. Lecture material is not novel if you've taken Geog 251, 255, 355, etc., but exams have certain questions that require detailed memorization with no study guide/mention of specific memorization beforehand. Assignments graded 1-2 days before next assignment due, hard to implement feedback.
Super course! The assignments and lectures are structured well. I like that we are given real data to practice the spatial statistics techniques. Overall a great course experience.

This is one of the most useful courses in the SIS certificate! I am glad I took it, got a good grade in the end! The content is good and the prof and ta explained well. The practical and hands-on parts were really enjoyable. I interviewed for a job and got it based on my skills from this course. Thanks Suzana and Taylor!!

Get to know the TA for any class you take of hers and ask them questions. Prof not helpful with clarification in terms of what material will be tested. Material is interesting but delivery is somewhat underwhelming. Her lectures felt as though it was a chore for her as though she wanted to get it over with. Class is passable, would not recommend.
She is very nice, very patient and very helpful during office hour. Fair exams and fair marker. I got a C+ , but it's because I did not study hard. If you put effort in, guarantee a B for u.

Learned valuable skills that got me a job!  If you are willing to work you do well. Was in a group with quite a few slackers who were looking to pass the work on to me. I did the work, got the skills and then a job while my group members are still complaining!! Goes to show, do the work and you will come out well. All round good course.

Absolute nightmare of a course. TA was helpful at working on our models and was the only reason I came out of this course alive. Prerequisite were entirely useless. Expectations were that if you had never used Idrisi before you would be okay, however, the learning curve was so steep that I drowned. If you haven't worked with Idrisi stay far faraway

What she asks of you is trivially easy; the way she asks it makes it nearly useless and incomprehensible. Dumbed-down, annoying, and worthless class. Should be revamped with a new instructor. Worst geography class I've taken. (BSC student)

I enjoyed this course. It was very hands on and practical. In the end you get a project for your portfolio. If you follow all the instructions the prof gives there is no problem. Don't skip classes, you will fall behind. Thanks Suzana!
